title: conyza bonariensis var. microcephala
intro: Conyza bonariensis var. microcephala, also known as dwarf fleabane or small-flowered fleabane, is a variety of the Conyza bonariensis plant, a flowering plant in the daisy family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in the treatment of various health issues. The health benefits of Conyza bonariensis var. microcephala include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system, while also exhibiting antimicrobial and antiseptic properties. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
